title: MCNV Resource Pack
description: The resource pack contains various retextures to vanilla Minecraft blocks as well as OpTiFine connected textures for the Minecraft: New Vegas mod. All of these are in the Fallout style, being sourced directly from Fallout: New Vegas.
body:
This resource pack was created for the project: "Minecraft: New Vegas"

The resource pack contains various retextures to vanilla Minecraft blocks as well as OpTiFine connected textures for the Minecraft: New Vegas mod. All of these are in the Fallout style, being sourced directly from Fallout: New Vegas and converted into a manner that they work well in the style of Minecraft blocks.

 

This was made for the sole purpose of packing into a modpack.

 

Credits: 

-Relicit

-ZRV01
